# Code of Conduct

Lithium is a small public project. Keep the bar high and the tone calm.

## Expected Behavior

- be respectful and specific
- assume good intent, but challenge weak technical arguments directly
- keep issues and pull requests focused on the product thesis
- report security problems privately through [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md)

## Unacceptable Behavior

- harassment, discrimination, or personal attacks
- doxxing, threats, or intimidation
- spam, trolling, or bad-faith issue filing
- publishing private security vulnerabilities in public issues

## Enforcement

Maintainers may edit, hide, lock, or remove comments, issues, pull requests, or contributors that violate this code of conduct.

## Scope

This applies to GitHub issues, pull requests, discussions around the project, and other public project spaces controlled by the maintainers.
